Title: Welcome to Grimhold
Content: Grimhold is a PvE server. Respect the rules, other survivors and the atmosphere of the world.

Title: Server Mod
Content: Your custom Grimhold loading screen is delivered through the Grimhold Workshop mod.

Title: Expansion Stack
Content: The server uses DayZ Expansion and other quality-of-life mods. Grimhold is the base for future custom features.

Title: Stay Ready
Content: Prepare for long trips, carry essentials and treat every encounter as part of the story of Grimhold.
